# People — 2008

Notable individuals whose actions and achievements defined the year 2008.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->
| Person | Summary |
|--------|---------|
| [Michael Phelps](michael-phelps.md) | American swimmer who won eight gold medals at the Beijing Olympics in August 2008, surpassing Mark Spitz's record and setting seven world records at a single Games. |
| [Rafael Nadal](rafael-nadal.md) | Spanish tennis player who won the French Open, his first Wimbledon title, and Olympic singles gold in 2008, taking the world No. 1 ranking from Roger Federer. |
| [Usain Bolt](usain-bolt.md) | Jamaican sprinter who set world records in the 100 m (9.69 s) and 200 m (19.30 s) at the Beijing Olympics in August 2008, becoming the sport's dominant figure. |
<!-- END GENERATED: category-index -->
